title: Ender Pearl Cooldown
description: Makes the ender pearl cooldown (normally 1 second) as long as you want it to be
body:
This mod changes the ender pearl cooldown (usually 1 second) to whatever you want it to be in ticks

When mod is started, config file is created. Change the number inside from `20` to whatever you want it to be, e.g: `100` = 5 seconds

NOTE: This mod was a commission that I paid for myself and I have full access and rights to the mod
